title: trifolium microdon
intro: Trifolium microdon, also known as small hop clover or small white clover, is a perennial herb in the legume family native to North America. Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to act as a diuretic, and it has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Trifolium microdon include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve kidney function, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Trifolium microdon can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
